raw_description:
Mandarin Oriental, Doha, one of Qatar’s most prestigious hotels, is located on Barahat Msheireb in the heart of Msheireb Downtown, where modern elegance meets Qatari charm and guests are within easy reach of the city’s cultural, retail, and business destinations.

The hotel features an outdoor and indoor swimming pool, a fully equipped fitness centre, and an award-winning spa offering a range of treatments, a sauna, and a hot tub. Signature dining is available at Liang, a Michelin-selected Cantonese restaurant, and IZU, serving French Mediterranean cuisine.

Rooms and suites are elegantly appointed with air conditioning, a flat-screen satellite TV, a coffee machine, and a private bathroom. Select accommodations include a kitchen and seating area. The 24-hour front desk provides personalised assistance throughout your stay.

Souq Waqif is 1.6 km from the hotel, while West Bay and other key business districts are within close reach. Hamad International Airport is approximately 25 minutes by car.

Couples particularly like the location — they rated it9.7for a two-person trip.

description: Experience clinical levels of high-end luxury at Mandarin Oriental, Doha. Located conveniently in its prime location, this property features 11 key amenities including 2 swimming pools, Free WiFi, Family rooms.
